[http://www.razerzone.com/ Razer] |created= 2013-10-16 LoL Division |disbanded= 2014-07-22 |trades= }} Karont3 is a well known Starcraft 2 club which acquired the roster of the spainsh team gBots eSports Club (roster made from gathering players from [[Giants Gaming]] and [[Wizards e-Sports Club]]). In these days they keep a League of Legends, DOTA 2, Call of Duty Ghosts and Hearthstone rosters. == History == == Timeline == {{TDRight |name1=2013 |name2=2014}} {{TDRight|tab}} * February 17, '''[[jer0m]]''' joins.
